---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behaviour in the application
title: "[Bug] Short description of the bug"
labels: 'bug'
type: bug
assignees: ''
---

### Description
<!--
Clearly describe what the bug is. What did you expect to happen vs. what actually happened?
-->

**Expected behaviour:**
<!-- What should have happened? -->

**Actual behaviour:**
<!-- What actually happened? -->

### Steps to Reproduce
<!--
Provide exact steps so any team member can reproduce the bug.
-->
1. Go to `...`
2. Click / call `...`
3. Observe `...`

### Environment
<!--
Check all that apply.
-->
- [ ] Frontend (React)
- [ ] Backend (FastAPI)
- [ ] Database

**Branch / Commit:** <!-- e.g. main / abc1234 -->
**OS:** <!-- e.g. Windows 11, macOS 15 -->
**Browser (if Frontend):** <!-- e.g. Chrome 121 -->
**Python version (if Backend):** <!-- e.g. 3.11 -->
**Node version (if Frontend):** <!-- e.g. 20.x -->

### Error Logs / Screenshots
<!--
Paste any relevant error messages, stack traces, or attach screenshots.
Use code blocks for log output.
-->


### Possible Cause (Optional)
<!--
If you have a suspicion about what is causing the bug, describe it here.
-->

### Acceptance Criteria (for the fix)
<!--
Define what "fixed" looks like. These will be verified in the linked PR.
-->
- [ ] The steps to reproduce no longer produce the described behaviour.
- [ ] No existing tests are broken by the fix.
- [ ] A regression test has been added to cover this bug (if applicable).
